markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review growthx.ai's partnership model for AI-optimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Nexla's current content (in-house blogs, technical docs) is not optimized for AI discovery, causing low traffic and high user churn.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Solution:** growthx.ai proposed a two-phase partnership: a 8-week strategy sprint (POC) followed by a 12-month execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Key Use Case:** Programmatically generate high-level, SEO-friendly pages for Nexla's 500+ connectors, capturing top-of-funnel search intent that technical docs miss.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Pricing:** $30k for the 8-week sprint, then $15k/month for execution. The scope (editorial vs. programmatic) can be swapped without changing the monthly fee.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)

## Topics

### Nexla's Content Challenges

  - [**Low Traffic & High Churn:** Past SEO content drove traffic but failed to convert visitors into repeat users.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [**Uncertain Strategy:** The team is unsure which topics to prioritize for AI discovery, as current in-house blogs are written for a specific point of view, not search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [**Content Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [**Blogs:** Not structured for AI engines.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [**Connectors:** Technical docs are too deep for top-of-funnel users searching for solutions (e.g., "SAP connector").](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Limited Bandwidth:** The small team (no product marketer) cannot scale content creation for 500+ connectors and daily releases.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### growthx.ai's Proposed Solution

  - [**Phase 1: 8-Week Strategy Sprint ($30k)**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Goal:** A proof-of-concept to align on quality and strategy before committing to a long-term contract.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
          - [**Weeks 1–2:** Create "artifacts" (knowledge base) from Nexla's resources (decks, docs) to enable technical writing.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
          - [**Weeks 3–4:** Publish 2–3 "calibration articles" to align on style and subject matter.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
          - [**Weeks 4–8:** Publish 5–10 articles to demonstrate value.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
      - [**Commitment:** \~2.5 hours/week from Nexla (kickoff, product deep dive, weekly sync).](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Growth Execution ($15k/month)**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Goal:** Scale content production to drive AI discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Cadence:** \~3 articles/week, adjusted for technical review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [**Scope Flexibility:** The monthly fee is fixed; the focus can be swapped between:](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
          - [**Editorial:** Standard blog posts and guides.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
          - [**Programmatic:** High-volume, templated pages (e.g., for connectors).](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Custom Looker dashboard and a "Scrunch" dashboard to track AI citation performance against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

### Programmatic Content for Connectors

  - [**Opportunity:** Create high-level, SEO-friendly pages for each of Nexla's 500+ connectors.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This captures top-of-funnel search intent (e.g., "SAP connector") that current technical docs miss, driving awareness and traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [**Example:** The Ramp "spender directory," where growthx.ai created a page for every vendor using internal data.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
      - [Leverages existing technical docs and product team input.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Requires an initial editorial phase to build context before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
      - [Send case studies for data/technical companies (e.g., Airbyte, Augment Code).](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
      - [Send the guide on growthx.ai's multi-model AI workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
      - [Clarify required client contacts for each phase.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [**Jayashree:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
      - [Send Nexla's sales decks, product one-pagers, and docs to Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
      - [Send 2–3 example articles to set quality expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
      - [Decision needed by end of November to secure a January/February start date.](https://fathom.video/share/pfBav1iMcx2Nry7dwQV_HDfkqxFA2bsu?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
